title: CLONE - Review the Asset tab during Simulation
description: As a Hyperfront dealer user I want the Asset tab during Simulation to display and correctly calculate key vehicle and pricing elements So that I can configure the asset accurately and update the invoice price when needed.
acceptance_criteria: AC1 – Power (kW) display: Given a vehicle is selected in the Simulation step When the Asset tab is displayed Then the Power (kW) value is automatically populated from the vehicle catalogue And The field is read-only if pre-populated. If not it can be edited
AC2 – VAT percentage display: Given a simulation is displayed When the Asset tab is opened Then the VAT percentage provided by Miles is displayed And the value is not editable

AC3 – Summary price computation applies the defined formulas: Given all asset price components are available When the system displays the Summary section Then the following formulas must be applied: Total exc. VAT = Catalogue Price + Options + Transport cost + Car tax (if any) + Exempt quote (if any) – Discounts (OEM + Other discounts); Accessories = Accessories Price inc VAT + Transform accessories inc VAT; Registration tax = Price of registration tax - Discount registration tax; Total incl. VAT = Total exc. VAT + VAT amount + OEM services + Accessories + Registration tax + Free fee inc VAT; Total Invoice Price = Total incl. VAT – Ecobonus - Trade in

AC4 – Editing Total Invoice Price recalculates discounts using delta excl. VAT: Given the Summary is displayed And a calculated Total Invoice Price is shown When the dealer edits the Total Invoice Price manually Then the system must: 1. Compute the delta between the original and the new Total Invoice Price (delta TTC); 2. Convert this delta to an excl. VAT value using: delta excl. VAT = delta incl. VAT / (1 + VAT%); 3. Add the delta excl. VAT to the "Other Discounts" field and update the discounts value on the summary section; 4. Recalculate the new Total exc. VAT; 5. Recalculate VAT amount and Total incl. VAT; 6. Update all Summary fields accordingly; 7. Display the new Total Invoice Price entered by the user
comments: TW : Check the miles configuration for VAT % and for the summary section
This file contains the mapping of the Asset fields. Workshop Asset Tab V1.xlsm
